name: Orange & Date Bread - Taste of Home
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1/4 cup Orange juice
1/2 cup Sugar
2 tbsp Grated orange rind
Cream butter and sugar. Add eggs, beating well. Combine dry ingredients and add alternately with the buttermilk. Fold in walnuts, dates, and orange rind. Pour into two greased 8 1/2 inch pans and bake at 350°F for about an hour. Comb NOTES: Can be made ahead and frozen.
From Taste of Home magazine, Dec.'94
Reposted for you by: Bill Webster
